title: Heavy Scythe
description: Retexture to the Mace & Heavy Core
body:
Replaces the mace model/texture with a scythe and changes the heavy core model/texture into the head of a scythe.

![Placed Heavy Core & Dropped Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/400366a59873a07dae7d29bccae520823215341a.png)
